---
title: "test_update_gemini_manifest_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_update_gemini_manifest_empire.py"
loc: 14
complexity: 1
logic_score: 6.65
style_score: 3.74
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 2.53
---

## Intent
The `test_update_gemini_manifest_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_update_manifest_simple. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_update_manifest_simple. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.tools.update_gemini_manifest](file://src.tools.update_gemini_manifest)

### Exports
- `test_update_manifest_simple`
